title: Add URL Query Parameter for Dictionary vs Migration View Tracking
description: When toggling between Dictionary and Migration views, the URL now includes a `view` query parameter (`?view=dictionary` or `?view=migration`) to enable analytics tracking via Pendo. This allows product analytics to distinguish object-level page views by the active view context. The URL updates dynamically when the user clicks the view toggle buttons.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the Dictionary toggle sets the URL to /object/{ObjectName}?view=dictionary
Clicking the Migration toggle sets the URL to /object/{ObjectName}?view=migration
URL updates without triggering a full page reload
Pendo can capture the view parameter for analytics segmentation
middleware_changes: Toggle button click handlers now update the browser URL with the appropriate view query parameter using history.pushState or equivalent, enabling Pendo analytics tracking.
implementation_notes: The URL parameter is used exclusively for Pendo analytics tracking to segment object-level page views by Dictionary vs Migration context. No functional behavior changes from the user's perspective.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the URL parameter update on staging.
